content: Phase 4.1: Build the Eyes_OnePass_Benchmark.ipynb cell structure
Phase 4.2: Implement CCP bitmap-to-bbox conversion (Supervisely format → normalised 0..1000 grid)
Phase 4.3: ipywidgets accept/reject/edit UI for label verification
Phase 4.4: HTTP client that hits /closet/analyze with EYES_ONE_PASS=true + per-photo IoU compute
Phase 4.5: 90th-percentile IoU report + gate decision (flip flag if ≥0.7 on 90% of photos)
Phase 4.6: Companion runbook doc (one-shot procedure to flip EYES_ONE_PASS=true in deploy/.env.example)
Phase 4.7: Validate notebook JSON parses + smoke-run the non-LLM cells locally
